hyperedges.note: Three successive designs of the productivity efficiency metric: read-time percentile complexity -> percentile-weighted KPI -> frozen-baseline КПД (each supersedes the previous).
Single chatDrawer session-type union (id===type singleton invariant) extended across three sequential plans: baseline benchmark/roadmap types, then +generalChat, then +skillImprover.
single streamed Build job chains structural indexing, the graphify semantic pass, and artifact export into one pipeline

hyperedges.label: Source Toggle System: SOURCE_KEYS + filterBySources + graphSources + CodeGraphTab
Graphify Layer Pipeline: mergeGraphifyGraph produces graphify-origin nodes + defined_in bridges persisted by graphifyRunner
Origin Color System: colorForNode + GRAPHIFY_COLOR + DEFINED_IN_EDGE_COLOR in graph-colors.ts
